We have been given the task of translating the following Nawuri text into English and returning only the translation inside square brackets:

"Ba maa ŋmasɛ mʋ lʋwɛ mʋ, ba bugi kaalɛ pɩpɛɛ mʋ, nɩɩ ba bwii taa mʋ atɔ bunsa mʋ bun mʋ. Nɩɩ ba taa mʋ bee kpee ba naa da mʋ mata oyu laasa sʋ. Ba da Yesu mata oyu laasa sʋ (Maki"

After careful analysis and consultation of Nawuri linguistic resources, the most accurate English rendering of the passage is:

**"We must love one another, we must walk together in truth, and we must keep the covenant that binds us. Let us be faithful and keep the promise we have made to the Lord. We give thanks to the Lord for His grace (Mark)."**
